notes: Official Adams County OEM and CodeRED pages include jurisdiction-specific emergency alert signup guidance. No public evacuation map found.
Official Alamosa County Emergency Management and Sheriff pages verified. Alamosa OEM links residents to SLV Emergency and SLV E911; no county-hosted public evacuation map found.
Official Arapahoe County OEM page and ArapAlert signup source. ArapAlert requires selecting the law-enforcement agency serving the address. No public evacuation map found.
Official Archuleta County Sheriff emergency operations page, county Nixle alert page, and sheriff-hosted evacuation process PDF verified. No official public evacuation map found.
Official Baca County Emergency Management, Sheriff, and Rave/Smart911 alert signup links verified from county and Colorado DHSEM pages. No official public evacuation map found.
Official Bent County emergency management and Bent County Sheriff pages verified. Colorado DHSEM lists the Smart911/Rave signup link. No official public evacuation information page or map found.
Boulder Office of Disaster Management identifies the public information map as official for evacuation areas and road closures. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
Official City and County of Broomfield Emergency Management, Police, Evacuations, and LookoutAlert/Smart911 links verified. No official public evacuation map found.
Official Chaffee County OEM, Sheriff, and Everbridge signup page verified. No standing official public evacuation information page or map found.

Official Cheyenne County Emergency Management and county-hosted Sheriff pages verified. County Sheriff page links Reverse 911 and weather-alert signup. The older sheriff-hosted HTTP site is not linked because its HTTPS endpoint fails TLS in some browsers. No official public evacuation information page or map found.
Official Clear Creek County Emergency Management, Sheriff, and LookoutAlert resources verified. No standalone evacuation-only map was verified.
Official Conejos County Emergency Management and Sheriff pages verified. Conejos OEM links SLV E-911/Everbridge; no county-hosted public evacuation map found.

Official Costilla County Emergency Management page links the ArcGIS emergency hub for incidents, notices, evacuations, shelters, resources, and road closures, and links SLV E911 alerts. Map geometry is linked but not ingested into this map.
Official Crowley County OEM page and Crowley County Sheriff pages verified; OEM and sheriff dispatch pages link the CodeRED signup. No official public evacuation information page or map found.

Custer County's county-hosted emergency management page is not linked because its HTTPS endpoint fails TLS in some browsers. Emergency-management contact is linked through Colorado DHSEM's official Local Emergency Managers page. Sheriff link uses the official State of Colorado sheriff portal. Everbridge signup and Aspen Acres Fire information map verified. Map is incident-specific.

Official Delta County emergency management and sheriff pages verified. County Emergency Alerts page is tied to Delta County 9-1-1 and links Delta Genasys registration. No official public evacuation map found.
Official Denver OEM, Public Safety, and Reverse Emergency Notifications signup. No public evacuation map found.
No county-hosted OEM page found. Official Dolores County OEM social page, county sheriff page, and Everbridge signup verified.
Official Douglas County Sheriff emergency management page and DougCoAlert signup. DougCoAlert replaced CodeRED. No public evacuation map found.
Official Eagle County emergency management, sheriff emergency notification, Genasys map, and ECAlert signup resources. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
PPROEM current alerts page embeds official incident, evacuation area, and road closure maps. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
Official Elbert County OEM, sheriff, Alert Center, and ElbertCountyAlert Smart911 signup verified. County map link found was a weather hazard map, not an evacuation map.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official Garfield County emergency management, GarCo911 emergency notification, and Everbridge signup resources. Official wildfire GIS page says evacuation zones are still in development.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official Grand County OEM, sheriff, alert signup, and countywide evacuation zone map. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official Huerfano emergency services, public-safety, and HCNotify signup resources. No direct official evacuation map URL surfaced.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official Jeffco OEM, LookoutAlert signup, and Jeffcom active-alert page. Active-alert page can show current alert boundaries, but no standalone evacuation-only map is connected.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official La Plata County emergency management, sheriff, ReadyLaPlata evacuation viewer, and LPC Alerts pages. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
Official Lake County OEM, sheriff, Willow Fire page, continuously updated incident evacuation map, and Everbridge signup.
Official Larimer County emergency page, sheriff, Aegis evacuation page, and NoCoAlert signup. Geometry is linked but not ingested into the map.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.

Official Lincoln County Emergency Manager page and Lincoln County Sheriff site verified; county and sheriff pages link CodeRED for weather and emergency notifications. No dedicated evacuation information page or public evacuation map found.

Official Logan County emergency management and sheriff pages verified; sheriff-hosted Everbridge page states it sends emergency notifications including evacuation notices. No public evacuation map found.
Official Mesa County Sheriff emergency management, sheriff, Everbridge signup, and incident-specific pre-evacuation map post.

Official Mineral County OEM and sheriff pages verified; sheriff-hosted Voyent Alert page says to register for alerts and notices from Mineral County and the City of Creede. No public evacuation map found.
Official Moffat County OEM and sheriff pages link the Moffat Alerts Regroup signup. No public evacuation map found.
Official Montezuma County OEM, sheriff, and Everbridge signup resources. No public evacuation map found.

Official Montrose County OEM page links Montrose Alerts and the Gold Mountain Fire evacuation map; July 6 county news verifies voluntary evacuation for Zone 34 and links the same map. Sheriff site verified separately. Map geometry is linked but not ingested into this map.

Official Morgan County emergency management and sheriff pages verified; emergency management links CodeRED and says it sends evacuation notices and other emergency notifications. No public evacuation map found.
Official Otero County emergency management and sheriff pages verified; emergency management links county CodeRED enrollment. No dedicated evacuation information page or public evacuation map found.
Official Ouray County emergency management, sheriff, evacuation information, maps and closures, and Genasys alert registration resources.

Official Park County emergency management, sheriff, disaster and evacuation preparedness, and CodeRED pages verified. County pages include preparedness guidance but no public evacuation map was verified.

Official Phillips County emergency management and sheriff pages verified; county emergency notification signup page links the Phillips County Hyper-Reach signup. No dedicated evacuation information page or public evacuation map found.

Official Pitkin County emergency management page links Pitkin Emergency and Pitkin Alert; the official Pitkin Alert domain resolves to this Everbridge portal. The official Pitkin Emergency evacuation page states Pitkin uses Genasys EVAC and links the public Genasys map. Map geometry is linked but not ingested into this map.
Official Prowers County emergency management, sheriff, and CodeRED pages verified; CodeRED page lists evacuation notice and route among alert uses. No public evacuation map found.
Official Pueblo Sheriff emergency management, emergency status board, active evacuation map, and Smart911 signup resources.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.
Official Rio Grande County OEM page links emergency alerts; Colorado DHSEM lists the same Everbridge signup. County sheriff page verified. No official current evacuation map was verified.

Official Routt County emergency-management page identified. Colorado DHSEM lists Routt Alerts via Everbridge. Official Routt County materials reference the ArcGIS current incidents and evacuations experience. Map geometry is linked but not ingested into this map.
Official Saguache County OEM page links Everbridge; Colorado DHSEM also lists Saguache Alerts. Sheriff page verified on county site. No public evacuation map found.
Official San Juan County OEM page says public emergency alerts are through Nixle and links Nixle registration; sheriff page verified. No public evacuation map found.
Official San Miguel County emergency management page verified. Colorado DHSEM lists San Miguel Alerts as the Genasys portal. No sheriff or evacuation map link was separately verified in this pass.
Official county emergency manager and sheriff pages verified. County Communications Center page links the OnSolve/CodeRED portal for Sedgwick County emergency alerts. No public evacuation map found.
Official Summit County emergency management, sheriff emergency management, evacuation assessment, and Summit County Alert signup. No public evacuation map found.
Official Teller County OEM, sheriff, evacuations/shelters status page, and Peak Alerts signup. No dedicated public evacuation map found.

Official Washington County emergency management and sheriff pages verified. Colorado DHSEM lists Washington Alerts as Hyper-Reach; use DHSEM/Hyper-Reach for the current signup. No public evacuation map found.
Colorado DHSEM Local Emergency Managers page lists this county emergency-management site and alert link. No separate sheriff or evacuation map link was verified in this pass.

Official Yuma County departments page lists Yuma County Office of Emergency Management and the Sheriff. Direct OEM and Sheriff sites are not linked here because their HTTPS endpoints were unreliable in browser/TLS checks. Colorado DHSEM lists Yuma Alerts as Hyper-Reach; use DHSEM/Hyper-Reach for the current signup. No public evacuation map found.
